tool_args.label: CTDOT New Haven Line 5% Fare Increase Effective September 1, 2025
tool_args.raw_text: CTDOT proposes that New Haven Line fares for travel to or from stations located in the State of Connecticut be increased by 5%, effective September 1, 2025

payload.description: 5% fare increase on New Haven Line for travel to/from Connecticut stations

tool_args.label: Estimated Net Revenue Increase 2025
tool_args.raw_text: increase New Haven Line net revenue by approximately $1.4 million in 2025

tool_args.label: Estimated Net Revenue Increase 2026
tool_args.raw_text: increase New Haven Line net revenue by approximately $16.1 million in 2026

tool_args.label: Estimated Net Revenue Increase 2027
tool_args.raw_text: increase New Haven Line net revenue by approximately $20.5 million in 2027

tool_args.label: 5% Fare Increase Effective September 1, 2025
tool_args.raw_text: CTDOT proposes that New Haven Line fares for travel to or from stations located in the State of Connecticut be increased by 5%, effective September 1, 2025

payload.claim_text: CTDOT proposes that New Haven Line fares for travel to or from stations located in the State of Connecticut be increased by 5%, effective September 1, 2025
payload.subject: New Haven Line fares to/from Connecticut stations

tool_args.label: 5% Fare Increase Effective July 1, 2026
tool_args.raw_text: CTDOT proposes that New Haven Line fares ... be increased by 5%, effective July 1, 2026, with CTDOT reserving the ability to withdraw the July 1, 2026, increase

payload.claim_text: New Haven Line fares for travel to or from Connecticut stations be increased by 5%, effective July 1, 2026, with CTDOT reserving the ability to withdraw the July 1, 2026, increase should there be intervening changes to CTDOT's budget
payload.subject: New Haven Line fares to/from Connecticut stations

tool_args.label: No Fare Change for New York State Travel
tool_args.raw_text: There will be no change in fares charged on the New Haven Line for travel taking place wholly within New York State.

payload.claim_text: There will be no change in fares charged on the New Haven Line for travel taking place wholly within New York State
payload.subject: New Haven Line fares

tool_args.label: Equity Analysis Conclusion
tool_args.raw_text: CTDOT ... published its equity analysis on its webpage, which concluded that the fare changes would not have a disparate impact or disproportionate burden on minority or low-income populations

payload.claim_text: The fare changes would not have a disparate impact or disproportionate burden on minority or low-income populations
payload.subject: fare changes

tool_args.label: Connecticut Branch Line Fares
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North will also implement CTDOT's Connecticut Branch Line fare increases at the same times as the New Haven Main Line increases. Under ARSA, Branch Line fares are solely determined by CTDOT.

payload.claim_text: Metro-North will also implement CTDOT's Connecticut Branch Line fare increases at the same times as the New Haven Main Line increases. Under ARSA, Branch Line fares are solely determined by CTDOT.

tool_args.label: UniTicket and UniRail
tool_args.raw_text: UniTicket prices will not be affected by the proposed increase. UniRail prices will be increased based upon CTDOT's determination of fares.

payload.claim_text: UniTicket prices will not be affected by the proposed increase. UniRail prices will be increased based upon CTDOT's determination of fares.

tool_args.label: CTDOT proposes New Haven Line fare increases
tool_args.raw_text: The Connecticut Department of Transportation (\u201cCTDOT\u201d) proposes that New Haven Line fares for travel to or from stations located in the State of Connecticut be increased by 5%

tool_args.raw_text: MTA Board hereby approves implementation of the increases proposed by CTDOT to the Metro-North New Haven Line Main Line fares
